project.name: SolvynHQ
project.description: Premium B2B/B2C website & product development for Solvyn luxury sunscreen brand

tasks.name: WordPress & Elementor Setup
tasks.description: WordPress installation, hosting configuration, admin access. Elementor Pro activation.

tasks.name: Global Styles (Fonts, Colors, Spacing)
tasks.description: Configure Elementor global settings: Playfair Display (headlines), Inter (body). Colors: Olive Green #6C7B5A, Soft Sand #EAE4D9, Muted Rust #B96E5C, Deep Charcoal #2A2A2A, Off-White #F7F5F0. Global spacing, container widths, default button styles.

tasks.name: Header / Navigation
tasks.description: Responsive navigation: logo placement, desktop menu links (About, Shield, Partners, Discover, Contact), mobile hamburger menu, scroll-aware sticky behavior. Consistent across all pages.

tasks.name: Footer
tasks.description: DTC waitlist block ("Be the first to experience Solvyn at home" + email input), B2B reminder link, nav links, Instagram social link, legal text. Deep charcoal background, clean minimal design.

tasks.name: Media Library & Asset Upload
tasks.description: Upload product photography, lifestyle images, team headshots, partner logos, icons. Organize and optimize file sizes. Use Unsplash placeholders where final assets aren't ready.

tasks.name: Pouch Design Concept & Direction
tasks.description: Overall visual direction for the Shield single-use pouch packaging.

tasks.name: Dieline Design
tasks.description: Print-ready dieline layout for the Shield pouch.

tasks.name: Ingredients & Compliance Label
tasks.description: FDA Drug Facts panel, ingredients list, usage directions, warnings.

tasks.name: Color Version 1
tasks.description: First color variant of the Shield pouch design.

tasks.name: Color Version 2
tasks.description: Second color variant of the Shield pouch design.

tasks.name: Design Revision Round 1
tasks.description: First round of revisions based on feedback.

tasks.name: Design Revision Round 2
tasks.description: Second round of revisions. Final refinements.

tasks.name: Print Sample Sent to Production
tasks.description: Final approved design files sent to printer. Awaiting physical sample.

tasks.name: Product Mockup — Pouch Standalone
tasks.description: Clean product mockup of the Shield pouch.

tasks.name: Scene Mockup — Poolside
tasks.description: Shield pouch mockup in a luxury poolside setting.

tasks.name: Scene Mockup — Hotel Bathroom
tasks.description: Shield pouch mockup in a premium hotel bathroom.

tasks.name: Scene Mockup — Spa / Wellness
tasks.description: Shield pouch mockup in a spa or wellness center.

tasks.name: Scene Mockup — Beach / Resort Outdoor
tasks.description: Shield pouch mockup in an outdoor beach or resort environment.

tasks.name: Scene Mockup — Event / Welcome Kit
tasks.description: Shield pouch mockup in an event or hospitality welcome kit context.

tasks.name: S1: Hero
tasks.description: Full-width immersive hero. Headline: "Protection That Meets You Where Life Happens". Dual CTAs: B2B "Request a Conversation" + DTC "Join the Waitlist". Lifestyle background image. Subtle parallax or Ken Burns effect.

tasks.name: S2: Brand Mission / Our Philosophy
tasks.description: Emotional anchor section. Headline: "Simplifying Sun Protection for Real Life". Sand/beige background, staggered text reveal.

tasks.name: S3: Product Intro — Shield
tasks.description: Product teaser. Headline: "Shield by Solvyn". Key attributes as badges: FDA SPF, 100% Mineral, Hypoallergenic, Reef-Safe, Sealed & Tamper-Proof. CTA: "Learn More" → /shield. Asymmetric layout.

tasks.name: S4: Why It Matters (Differentiation)
tasks.description: 4 value points in 2x2 grid or staggered cards. Olive green accents, sand/beige background.

tasks.name: S5: Why Mineral
tasks.description: Educational section on mineral sunscreen benefits. Mineral vs. chemical comparison, safety advantages, environmental benefits.

tasks.name: S6: Trust & Credibility
tasks.description: Three sub-blocks: A) Medical Advisory — Dr. Eduardo Weiss, MD. B) Certifications — FDA, Reef-Safe, Hypoallergenic. C) Partners — logo showcase.

tasks.name: S7: B2B Value Proposition
tasks.description: Hospitality-focused section. 5 benefits: hygiene, guest satisfaction, operational simplicity, sustainability, cost efficiency. CTA: "Request a Conversation".

tasks.name: Homepage Responsive — Desktop, Tablet, Mobile
tasks.description: Full responsive optimization of all 7 homepage sections across desktop, tablet, and mobile breakpoints. Touch-friendly CTAs, proper stacking, image scaling, typography sizing.

tasks.name: About Us
tasks.description: Company story, mission statement, team bios (Chaim Cohen — CEO, Mark Caraher — Sales & Marketing), contact CTA. Responsive across all breakpoints.

tasks.name: Contact Us
tasks.description: Contact page with B2B and D2C contact forms, email, and any relevant business info. Clean layout, responsive.

tasks.name: Terms & Conditions
tasks.description: Legal terms page. Standard terms of use, disclaimers, and governing law. Clean typographic layout.

tasks.name: Privacy Policy
tasks.description: Privacy policy page. Data collection, usage, cookies, third-party services, user rights. Clean typographic layout.

tasks.name: Shield Product Page
tasks.description: Full product page: hero with product images, 6 key attributes, 7 ingredients, clean commitments, how-to-use steps, contact CTA.

tasks.name: Partners Page
tasks.description: Partner network showcase. Logos, partnership details, B2B positioning. "Our Growing Network" with partner highlights.

tasks.name: Discover Page
tasks.description: Brand discovery / lifestyle page. Educational content, brand story, ingredient deep-dives, or editorial-style content.

tasks.name: Form Integration & Testing
tasks.description: Wire up all contact forms (B2B inquiry, D2C waitlist, general contact). Test submissions, confirmations, and email delivery.

tasks.name: CTA Linking & Functionality
tasks.description: Ensure all CTAs across every page link to correct destinations. "Request a Conversation" → contact form, "Join the Waitlist" → waitlist form, "Learn More" → /shield, etc.

tasks.name: Email & Marketing Automations
tasks.description: Set up automated responses for form submissions, waitlist confirmations, B2B inquiry follow-ups. Connect to email marketing platform if applicable.

tasks.name: Keyword Research & Strategy
tasks.description: Research target keywords for luxury sunscreen, mineral SPF, B2B hospitality sunscreen, reef-safe sunscreen, etc. Identify primary and secondary keywords per page. Map keywords to pages. Use Google Keyword Planner, Ubersuggest, or similar tools.

tasks.name: Competitor SEO Analysis
tasks.description: Analyze top competitors (other luxury/mineral sunscreen brands, hospitality amenity companies). Review their keyword targets, content strategies, page structures, and backlink profiles. Identify gaps and opportunities.

tasks.name: SEO Copywriting — Titles & Meta Descriptions
tasks.description: Write optimized title tags (under 60 chars) and meta descriptions (under 160 chars) for every page: Homepage, Shield, About, Contact, Partners, Discover, T&C, Privacy. Incorporate target keywords naturally.

tasks.name: SEO Copywriting — Headings & On-Page Copy
tasks.description: Audit and optimize H1/H2/H3 heading hierarchy across all pages. Ensure each page has one clear H1 with primary keyword. Refine body copy to include target keywords naturally without keyword stuffing.

tasks.name: Open Graph & Social Meta Tags
tasks.description: Write OG titles, OG descriptions, and select OG images for every page. Add Twitter Card meta tags. Ensure proper preview when shared on social media and messaging apps.

tasks.name: Technical SEO Setup
tasks.description: Generate and submit XML sitemap. Configure robots.txt. Set canonical URLs for all pages. Add structured data / schema markup (Organization, Product, BreadcrumbList). Verify with Google Rich Results Test.

tasks.name: Alt Text Audit & Optimization
tasks.description: Write descriptive, keyword-aware alt text for every image across the site. Product photos, lifestyle images, team headshots, partner logos. Ensure accessibility compliance.

tasks.name: Internal Linking Strategy
tasks.description: Plan and implement strategic internal links between pages. Link Shield references to /shield, partner mentions to /partners, about mentions to /about, etc. Ensure crawlability and link equity distribution.

tasks.name: Google Search Console & Indexing
tasks.description: Set up Google Search Console. Verify domain ownership. Submit sitemap. Request indexing for all pages. Monitor for crawl errors or indexing issues.

tasks.name: Image Optimization
tasks.description: Compress all images, convert to WebP, add alt text, responsive sizing, lazy loading.

tasks.name: Performance Optimization
tasks.description: Lighthouse / PageSpeed audit. Lazy loading, caching, CSS/JS minification, CDN.

tasks.name: Domain, SSL & Analytics
tasks.description: Point domain to hosting, SSL certificate, Google Analytics / Tag Manager setup.

tasks.name: Scroll Animations & Hover Effects
tasks.description: Scroll-triggered fade-in + slide-up, staggered reveals, hero load sequence, subtle parallax, smooth hover transitions.

tasks.name: Cross-Browser Testing
tasks.description: Test on Chrome, Safari, Firefox, Edge. iOS Safari and Android Chrome. Fix rendering inconsistencies.

tasks.name: Client Review & Revisions
tasks.description: Present site for review. Collect feedback, implement revision rounds.

tasks.name: Final QA Pass
tasks.description: Full quality check: all links, forms, images, copy, responsive on all breakpoints.

tasks.name: Go-Live & Production Verification
tasks.description: Launch site. Verify SSL, redirects, forms, analytics, social meta tags.

tasks.name: Research & Add Custom Icons
tasks.description: Look up and source custom icon sets for the website. Evaluate options (custom illustrations, premium icon packs, or commissioned designs) that align with Solvyn's luxury brand. Replace generic icons across all pages with cohesive custom alternatives.
